case_title: MARCOS VENEGAS VS. GEORGE PHILLIP HAWAWINI

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,300.00 FILED BY VENEGAS, MARCOS AS TO DEFENDANT HAWAWINI, GEORGE PHILLIP (MANGIARE RESTURANT) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-17-2014 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-10-2014 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO FEB-13-2015 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-07-2015 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VENEGAS, MARCOS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HAWAWINI, GEORGE PHILLIP (MANGIARE RESTURANT) $3,300.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,300.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $50.00) SERVED MAR-26-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HAWAWINI, GEORGE PHILLIP (MANGIARE RESTURANT)

THE INTERPRETER HAS AN OATH ON FILE WITH THE COURT. NO COSTS, IFP FILED BY PLAINTIFF. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
